470335.name: Dimension World Battle Greaves [1]
470335.description:
POW + 7, CON + 7, MaxHP - 10%.
Every 2 refine rate, reduces variable casting time by 1%.
If refine rate is 7 or higher, increases attack speed (reduces delay after attack by 10%).
If refine rate is 9 or higher, P.ATK + 5, increases melee physical damage by 10%.
If refine rate is 11 or higher, reduces variable casting time by 5%, reduces fixed casting time by 1 seconds, increases melee physical damage by additional 10%.
^ffffff_^000000
When equipped with Venom Magic Ring, increases physical damage against all size and all property enemies by 10%, increases physical damage against monsters in Encroached Geffenia area by 20%.
^ffffff_^000000
When equipped with Signet of Circulation: Spring, P.ATK + 7, increases physical damage against monsters in Encroached Geffenia area by 15%.
^ffffff_^000000
^CC3D3D[Bonus by grade]^000000
[Grade D] POW + 5, CON + 5, ATK + 25.
[Grade C] ATK + 3%, P.ATK + 3.
[Grade B] additional ATK + 5%, P.ATK + 3.
[Grade A] Increases melee physical damage by 15%, increases physical damage against monsters in Encroached Geffenia area by 15%.
Class: ^777777Shoes^000000  Defense: ^777777100^000000
Weight: ^777777120^000000
Armor Level: ^7777772^000000
Required Level: ^777777260^000000
Jobs: ^777777All Jobs^000000

470337.name: Dimension World Spell Shoes [1]
470337.description:
SPL + 7, CON + 7, increases SP consumption of skills by 10%.
Every 2 refine rate, reduces variable casting time by 1%.
If refine rate is 7 or higher, increases attack speed (reduces delay after attack by 10%).
If refine rate is 9 or higher, S.MATK + 5, increases poison, shadow and neutral property magical damage by 15%.
If refine rate is 11 or higher, reduces variable casting time by 5%, reduces fixed casting time by 1 seconds, increases water, wind, earth and fire property magical damage by 15%.
^ffffff_^000000
When equipped with Temple Magic Ring, increases magical damage against all size and all property enemies by 10%, increases magical damage against monsters in Encroached Geffenia area by 15%.
^ffffff_^000000
When equipped with Signet of Circulation: Autumn, S.MATK + 7, increases magical damage against monsters in Encroached Geffenia area by 10%.
^ffffff_^000000
^CC3D3D[Bonus by grade]^000000
[Grade D] SPL + 5, CON + 5, MATK + 25.
[Grade C] MATK + 3%, S.MATK + 3.
[Grade B] additional MATK + 5%, S.MATK + 3.
[Grade A] Increases water, wind, earth, fire, poison, shadow and neutral property magical damage by 15%, increases magical damage against monsters in Encroached Geffenia area by 10%.

470339.name: Dimension World Executioner Boots [1]
470339.description:
POW + 5, CON + 5, CRI + 3, MaxHP - 10%.
Every 2 refine rate, reduces variable casting time by 1%.
If refine rate is 7 or higher, increases attack speed (reduces delay after attack by 10%).
If refine rate is 9 or higher, P.ATK + 5, increases critical damage by 5%.
If refine rate is 11 or higher, CRI + 5, reduces fixed casting time by 1 seconds, increases critical damage by additional 10%.
^ffffff_^000000
When equipped with either Venom Magic Ring or Soul Magic Ring, increases physical damage against all size and all property enemies by 10%, increases physical damage against monsters in Encroached Geffenia area by 20%.
^ffffff_^000000
When equipped with Signet of Circulation: Winter, C.Rate + 5, increases physical damage against monsters in Encroached Geffenia area by 15%.

[Grade C] ATK + 3%, C.RATE + 4, increases critical damage by 10%.
[Grade B] additional ATK + 5%, P.ATK + 4.
[Grade A] Increases melee and long ranged physical damage by 8%, increases physical damage against monsters in Encroached Geffenia area by 12%.
